name: integration_this_is_one_of_those_stories_that_sounds
method:
this is one of those stories that sounds fake but is inspirational 
teenagers frustrated with calorie tracking build cal ai, use chatgpt to teach them code, lean into viral short-form content instead

phases.name: app_audit
steps: Score each by pain_point_clarity: 1-10 (calorie tracking = 9, scripture streak = 7)

phases.name: hook_generation
steps: Generate 3 hooks per app using builder-story template
Generate 3 hooks per app using pain-point-before/after template
Generate 3 hooks per app using milestone reveal template (X downloads in Y days)

phases.name: content_routing
steps: Append to CONTENT/social/posting_queue/ with platform tags [TikTok, IG_REELS, YT_SHORTS]
Update KPI_DASHBOARD.md with content_volume and projected_download_lift
